response.justification: Bogdan is a technically strong senior engineer with relevant experience in fintech and distributed systems. However, he is not a fit for this executive CTO role. His resume shows a career path as a senior individual contributor (IC) with no demonstrated experience in people management, team scaling, or executive leadership. The job requires a proven leader who has scaled engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, a core responsibility for which he has no listed experience.
strengths: Deep expertise in high-performance, low-latency distributed systems from roles at Dunnhumby and Stripe.
Strong, relevant domain experience in fintech infrastructure at companies like Stripe and RIDE Capital.
Recent hands-on experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling at Stripe.
concerns: Complete lack of formal engineering leadership or people management experience; all roles are senior ICs.
No track record of scaling an engineering organization or developing a senior technical leadership layer.
Agentic AI experience appears to be at the infrastructure contributor level, not the high-level system architect level required.
